analysis.reasoning: Core message: China highlights completion of its peacekeeping assistance and reconstruction mission at Beirut Port and pledges continued support to UN peacekeeping to maintain world peace and stability. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—emphasizes concrete support to UN peacekeeping, reconstruction assistance, and contributing to world peace and stability, fitting the cooperative, peace-promoting framing. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international role, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds domestically/technologically): Not applicable; no domestic achievement claims. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
